strings.noTrackLoaded: The trail is quiet... too quiet.
strings.dragDrop: Hitch it to the post, partner!
strings.idle: Just leanin' against the fence post.
strings.playing: We're ridin' hard now! Giddy up!
strings.paused: Whoa there, Bessie! Take a breather.
strings.stopped: Unpack the saddles. We're campin' here.
strings.loaded: Caught us a fresh stray for the herd!
strings.dropAudioFile: Throw another log on the fire.
strings.playBlocked: The Sheriff's blockin' the road! (Interaction required)
strings.shuffleOn: Wild West: The cattle are stampeding!
strings.shuffleOff: Single File: Keep 'em in a straight line.
strings.repeatOne: Circular Track: Stuck in a canyon.
strings.invalidThemeFile: That hat don't fit your head, son.
strings.invalidLangFile: I don't speak that city-slicker talk.
strings.uploadAudio: Lock it in the Wells Fargo safe.
strings.designedIn: Forged in a dusty smithy out in Nevada
strings.rewindTitle: Backtrack (Shift: -10s, Ctrl: Back to the Homestead)
strings.forwardTitle: Head for the horizon (Shift: +10s, Ctrl: Next Town)
strings.clearCacheTitle: 🚨 THE GREAT CANYON COLLAPSE: Listen here, partner. If you go clearin' the cache, you're burnin' down the homestead. Your custom duds, your fancy maps, and all your records are gonna be buried under a landslide. It's like startin' over with nothin' but your boots and a prayer. You sure you want to pull that trigger?
